Miguel Moreno

Postdoctoral Researcher, Mathematics Research Centre, University of Tampere .

  • Applications of Mathematics
  • Pure Mathematics
  • Popular Science
  • Events and Links
  • Contact
     
     

I am doctor in mathematics, currently a postdoctoral researcher at the Mathematics Research Centre of the Computer Science unit of the University of Tampere, working underthe guidance of Antti Kuusisto.

My research is focus on Mathematical Logic, set theory, model theory and computability. I am also interested in different applications of mathematics, and popular science.


On the top you can find the navigation bar of sections, and in each section page the navigation bar of subsections is on the left.


News


  •    Most recent preprint:   Model Comparison Games for Generalized Quantifiers. With Antti Kuusisto, and Matias Selin - arXiv - DOI: 10.48550/arXiv.2605.21170

  •    Most recent article:   On unsuperstable theories in GDST. Journal of Symbolic Logic - DOI: 10.1017/jsl.2023.82

  •    Most recent presentation:   Borel sets and the generalized Baire spaces. Slides - Event: Finnish Mathematical Days 2026.
